description: Small fragment of a letter in Judaeo-Arabic and Hebrew. In the hand of Shemuel b. Seʿadya? NB: Goitein's index card refers to this as an Abū Zikrī Kohen order of payment of 1 raṭl of oil—but this must refer to a different shelfmark, probably elsewhere in the T-S AS 145 folder.
description_he: שבר קטן של מכתב ביהודית-ערבית ועברית; כנראה בכתב יד שמואל בן סעדיה
